title: BRAT
creator: Charli XCX
note: Loud, confident, and unapologetically itself. Has been on repeat since release.

title: GNX
creator: Kendrick Lamar
note: Dense and layered. Each listen reveals something new.

title: MAGDALENE
creator: FKA twigs
note: A beautifully fractured record about grief and transformation. Hauntingly good.

title: Isles
creator: Bicep
note: Perfect late-night coding music. Emotional electronic that never gets old.
